title: TOSY Magnet Pyramid Glow - 1 Cube Transforms into 1 Billion Shapes, 12 pieces, 243 Magnets, Glowing, Christmas Stocking Stuffers Gift for Kids, Holographic Design, Creative Puzzle STEM/STEAM Toy
features: 1 BILLION SHAPES - Featuring 243 magnets, the patent-pending TOSY Magnet Pyramid helps you unlock your endless creativity and relaxing your mind. The included spinner accessory gives you even more possibilities for innovative transformations

GLOW IN THE DARK - Use the included UV Flashlight to make the holographic stickers glow even brighter and longer. Magnets are securely glued inside the plastic cube to ensure complete safety, and smooth plastic surface provide comfort for all players

GROW YOUR COLLECTION - Build larger and more impressive shapes by collecting and connecting multiple magnetic pyramid blocks. See our videos and the included booklet for more ideas and inspiration to play individually or with friends and family

SENSORY and STEAM TOY - This STEAM accredited toy offers many benefits for all, including kids 6+, teenagers, and adults: encouraging brain activity, increasing dexterity, relieving stress and anxiety, improving geometry and creative thinking

PERFECT GIFT - This is an excellent gift for many holidays and special occasions (Birthdays, Valentine, Christmas, Easter, Mother's Day, Back to School...). Visit our TOSY Store for a complete collection of other best-selling products
